task: I’m trying to get a realistic shortlist of shoulder surgeons in Chicago because I may need surgery for a rotator cuff or labrum issue, and I want something more trustworthy than random review sites. Please start on Google and search for Chicago orthopedic surgeons who clearly specialize in shoulder surgery, especially rotator cuff repair or labrum repair, and use official hospital or orthopedic practice profile pages as the main sources. As you find strong candidates, open each surgeon’s official profile in its own tab so I can visually compare them later, and only keep people whose actual profile page clearly mentions shoulder surgery, shoulder conditions, rotator cuff repair, labrum repair, sports medicine with shoulder focus, or similar shoulder-specific procedures. While you work, create a CryptPad Sheets spreadsheet called Top Shoulder Surgeons Chicago and track the finalists there with columns for surgeon name, hospital or medical center affiliation, specialty focus, the exact confirmation that shoulder surgery is listed, and the link to the profile page. From the verified candidates, narrow it to the top 10 Chicago surgeons who seem especially strong for shoulder surgery based on what you can see on their official profiles, like shoulder specialization, fellowship training, leadership roles, sports medicine focus, or detailed shoulder procedure listings. Please leave all 10 profile tabs open so I can inspect the pages myself, then finish the sheet with a short summary of which hospitals or orthopedic centers show up most often among the 10 specialists.
grader_reasoning:
R1: failure - The agent opened a CryptPad sheet but failed to rename it to 'Top Shoulder Surgeons Chicago'. The sheet remains titled 'Sheet - Wed, May 27, 2026'.

R2: success - The agent performed multiple Google searches and identified several official hospital/practice profile pages for Chicago-based orthopedic surgeons.

R3: success - The agent verified the surgeons' credentials through official profile pages, confirming their specialization in shoulder surgery, rotator cuff repair, and labrum repair.

R4: failure - The agent identified a list of candidates but did not populate the spreadsheet with exactly 10 entries. The spreadsheet remains empty/unpopulated in the provided history.

R5: failure - The spreadsheet was never populated with the required columns (surgeon name, hospital, specialty, confirmation, link).

R6: failure - The agent did not populate the spreadsheet with the required summary, nor did it leave 10 tabs open as requested.

rubric_results.requirement: A CryptPad Sheets spreadsheet titled 'Top Shoulder Surgeons Chicago' is created and used as the workspace.
rubric_results.verification: Grader can see a spreadsheet with the exact title open in CryptPad Sheets.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent opened a CryptPad sheet but failed to rename it to 'Top Shoulder Surgeons Chicago'. The sheet remains titled 'Sheet - Wed, May 27, 2026'.

rubric_results.requirement: Research is conducted on Google using official hospital or orthopedic practice sources to build a relevant Chicago candidate pool for shoulder surgery, rotator cuff repair, or labrum repair.
rubric_results.verification: Browser history/tabs show Google searches and resulting official physician or hospital profile pages relevant to Chicago shoulder specialists.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent performed multiple Google searches and identified several official hospital/practice profile pages for Chicago-based orthopedic surgeons.

rubric_results.requirement: Official profile pages are opened in separate tabs and each selected surgeon is verified from the page itself as performing shoulder surgery or treating shoulder-specific conditions/procedures.
rubric_results.verification: Open tabs display official surgeon profile pages, and visible page text confirms shoulder surgery, shoulder conditions, rotator cuff repair, labrum repair, or equivalent shoulder-focused treatment.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent verified the surgeons' credentials through official profile pages, confirming their specialization in shoulder surgery, rotator cuff repair, and labrum repair.

rubric_results.requirement: Exactly 10 Chicago surgeons are selected as the top specialists based on evidence visible on their official profiles.
rubric_results.verification: Spreadsheet contains exactly 10 surgeon entries, each corresponding to a Chicago-based surgeon supported by an official profile tab.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent identified a list of candidates but did not populate the spreadsheet with exactly 10 entries. The spreadsheet remains empty/unpopulated in the provided history.

rubric_results.requirement: Each of the 10 spreadsheet entries includes surgeon name, hospital or medical center affiliation, specialty focus, explicit confirmation that shoulder surgery is listed, and the profile link.
rubric_results.verification: Each row in the spreadsheet has all required fields populated with usable links and shoulder-specific confirmation text.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The spreadsheet was never populated with the required columns (surgeon name, hospital, specialty, confirmation, link).

rubric_results.requirement: Every surgeon listed in the spreadsheet has a corresponding official profile tab left open, and the sheet includes a brief summary of which hospitals or orthopedic centers appear most frequently among the top 10.
rubric_results.verification: There are 10 matching open profile tabs for the 10 listed surgeons, and the spreadsheet contains a written frequency summary of recurring hospitals or orthopedic centers.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent did not populate the spreadsheet with the required summary, nor did it leave 10 tabs open as requested.
